_note: REAL Google reviews only. Pulled from the Litzas Google Business Profiles. Never invent reviews. `author` may be null when the name isn't on hand — it renders as 'Google review'. Add your standout favorites here (with first names if you have them). `feature` pulls a review out as a standout: 'menu' shows it on the menu page, 'home' on the homepage. `pull` is an optional shorter verbatim excerpt used for the standout placement.

reviews.quote: This place has been open forever! The pizza is incredible. They have amazing cheese which I think sets their flavors apart. They make all things in house from the dough, sauce, dressing, garlic butter and meatballs. A great little local spot I've frequented since my youth, now shared with my kids.
reviews.pull: The pizza is incredible. They have amazing cheese which I think sets their flavors apart. They make all things in house from the dough, sauce, dressing, garlic butter and meatballs.

reviews.quote: This is some of the BEST pizza in the SLC valley! … Emily is the BEST waitress here!!!
reviews.pull: This is some of the BEST pizza in the SLC valley!

reviews.quote: My parents used to come to Litza's when they were students at the U, and we went as a family to celebrate my sister's graduation from law school. The pizza was excellent. The server was so friendly. It was a great place to bring our family, and we all had a great time.
I really enjoyed my experience at Litzas. Great vibes, kind staff and great food!
